@startuml
!define CIRCLE_COLOR #90EE90
!define SQUARE_COLOR #FF6B6B
!define DOT_COLOR #000000

class "system" as system {
  [C]
}

system --|> Admin admin
system --|> Book book
system --|> Reader reader
system --|> Lend_list lend_list

system ..> boolean lendBook(int bookId,int readerNumber)
system ..> boolean returnBook(int bookId,int readerNumber)
system ..> boolean addBook(Book book)
system ..> Book deleteBook(int bookId)
system ..> Book selectBook(int bookId)
system ..> boolean updateBook(Book book)

@enduml
